title: L3 cycle.start Payload
description: Emitted by cycle_invoke immediately after lock acquisition + idempotency clear + budget pre-check. Marks the start of a 5-phase cycle. cycle-098 Sprint 3A.

cycle_id.description: Content-addressed cycle identifier: sha256(schedule_id || ts_bucket || dispatch_contract_hash). Idempotency key.

schedule_id.description: Caller-supplied schedule identifier. Used in lock path .run/cycles/<schedule_id>.lock.

dispatch_contract_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical-JSON of the dispatch_contract block. Lets replay detect contract drift between runs of the same schedule_id.

timeout_seconds.description: Total cycle timeout (sum of phase budgets). Per-phase enforcement is _l3_run_phase responsibility.

budget_estimate_usd.description: Caller-declared cost estimate in USD. Forwarded to L2 budget_verdict when L2 enabled.

budget_pre_check.description: L2 verdict snapshot when L2 enabled; null when L2 disabled or unavailable.

started_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp at which cycle_invoke began the 5-phase loop.

schedule_cron.description: Cron expression from ScheduleConfig (informational; not validated here).

dry_run.description: True when invoked with --dry-run; phases skipped in favor of payload validation only.
